essence: Supports industrial engineers by collecting data, running time studies, and implementing efficiency improvements.

identity.title: Industrial Engineering Technician
identity.summary: Assists with process mapping, time and motion studies, and small‑scale improvements to increase throughput and reduce waste.

salary.notes: Technicians with strong data skills and lean experience are highly employable.

qualifications: Technical qualification in engineering or manufacturing
Experience with time studies, process mapping, and basic statistics
Familiarity with lean tools and continuous improvement

lifestyle.description: Field and office work supporting engineering projects; frequent shop‑floor observation and data collection.

habits: Collects production data and runs time studies
Prepares reports and visualisations for engineers
